---
format: 
  pdf: 
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    keep-tex: false
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - top=10mm
      - left=15mm
      - right=15mm
      - bottom=5mm
      - heightrounded
    fontfamily: libertine
    colorlinks: true
    fontsize: '18'
    include-in-header: 
      text: |
        \usepackage{multicol}
        \usepackage{lipsum}
        \usepackage{hyperref}
        \usepackage{libertine}
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \usepackage{lastpage}
        \setlength{\multicolsep}{2pt plus 1.0pt minus 0.75pt}
        \setlength{\columnsep}{3em}
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        \setlist{nolistsep}
        \setlength{\columnsep}{-2.8cm}
        \fancyhf{}
        \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
        \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage/\pageref{LastPage}}
        \AtBeginDocument{\pagestyle{fancy}}
---

<!-- TITLE -->
\begin{huge}\begin{center}{\bf SIMONE ROMITI}\end{center}\end{huge}

<!-- CONTACT INFO -->
\begin{center}
simone.romiti.1994@gmail.com |
\href{https://simone-romiti.github.io/}{Website} | 
\href{https://github.com/simone-romiti}{GitHub} | 
\href{https://www.linkedin.com/in/simone-romiti/}{LinkedIn} |
\href{https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6509-447X}{ORCID}
\end{center}
\vspace{15pt}

\hrule

\begin{large}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from datetime import date
years = (date.today() - date(2018, 3, 1)).days // 365

print(f"""

I am a computational physicist with {years}+ years of experience in software development for scientific applications. 
My core expertise lies in high-performance computing for large-scale numerical simulations and the statistical analysis of large datasets. 
I work on Bayesian Monte Carlo methods for data production and analysis, and Machine Learning methods for physics applications (PINNs, diffusion models). 

I am comfortable translating technical complexity for diverse audiences, and enjoy collaborative, multidisciplinary environments. 
I lead international research projects, and regularly present at workshops and conferences. 

Resident in Switzerland with B permit. 
\\\\
Outside the lab: skier, hiker, and karaoke enthusiast.

""")

```



\end{large}

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- SKILLS -->
\begin{large}{\bf TECHNICAL SKILLS}
  \vspace{9pt}
  \hrule
  \vspace{9pt}
\end{large}
\vspace{-0.15cm}

\begin{large}

\textbf{Languages} - GNU/Linux, Bash scripting, C/C++, Python, R

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{Python libraries \& frameworks} - NumPy, SciPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Plotly, Pytorch, Streamlit, SymPy, Jupyter


\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{HPC \& Systems} - CUDA, MPI, OpenMP, SLURM, EasyBuild

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{ML \& Data} - PyTorch, Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), VAEs, Diffusion Models, Bayesian Statistics, Monte Carlo

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{DevOps \& Tools} - Git, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Docker, LaTeX, Quarto, Markdown

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{Spoken Languages} - Italian (native), English (proficient), German (basic)

\end{large}

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
\begin{large}{\bf WORK EXPERIENCE}
  \vspace{9pt}
  \hrule
  \vspace{9pt}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}{\bf \href{https://www.unibe.ch/index_eng.html}{University of Bern}}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Apr 2024 -- Present\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.15cm}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}\textit{Postdoctoral Researcher}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Bern, Switzerland\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
\end{large}

\vspace{-0.09cm}

\begin{large}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Novel application of Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs)} | Schrödinger equation on the lattice | published in a peer-reviewed journal with open-source implementation.
    \item \textbf{Led high-precision analysis pipeline} for calculation of muon's $g-2$ | Monte Carlo history, analysis pipeline, Bayesian Model Averaging with full systematic error budget.
    \item \textbf{Improved algorithm scaling from $O(N^6)$ to $O(N \log N)$} for a class of critical multi-dimensional integrals using parallelized Fast Fourier Transforms.
    \item \textbf{Application of Nested Sampling algorithm} for phase transitions | density of states curve.
    \item \textbf{Production of open-source scientific simulation libraries} with versioned releases, CI/CD pipelines and automated testing.
    \item \textbf{Mentored 3 PhD students} on software engineering practices, numerical methods, and project delivery
  \end{itemize}
\end{large}

\vspace{9pt}

\begin{large}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}{\bf \href{https://www.uni-bonn.de/en/home?set_language=en}{University of Bonn}}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Nov 2021 -- Mar 2024\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.15cm}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}\textit{Postdoctoral Researcher}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Bonn, Germany\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
\end{large}

\vspace{-0.09cm}

\begin{large}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Designed and ran Monte Carlo simulations} on international HPC machines | Monte Carlo history analysis, tuning, statistical validation of multi-terabyte datasets
    \item \textbf{Developed a novel numerical method} achieving machine-precision exactness for a class of operator algebra constraints | published in a peer-reviewed journal.
    \item \textbf{Hybrid method combining Monte Carlo simulations with Quantum Computing} for lattice theories
    \item \textbf{Mentored 3 graduate students} and delivered \textbf{tutorial sessions for undergraduate courses}
  \end{itemize}
\end{large}

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- <\!-- PROJECTS -\-> -->
<!-- \begin{large}{\bf SELECTED PROJECTS} -->
<!--   \vspace{9pt} -->
<!--   \hrule -->
<!--   \vspace{9pt} -->

<!--   \begin{multicols}{2} -->
<!--     \begin{flushleft} -->
<!--       \textbf{\href{https://nutrizionistafrancescobartolazzi.webnode.it/}{Patient Management Web App}} -->
<!--     \end{flushleft} -->
<!--     \begin{flushright}2026\end{flushright} -->
<!--   \end{multicols} -->
<!-- \end{large} -->

<!-- \vspace{-0.09cm} -->

<!-- \begin{large} -->
<!--   \begin{itemize} -->
<!--     \item Built a full-stack data application in \textbf{Python}/\textbf{Streamlit} for managing patient records with data ingestion, transformation, and storage pipelines — delivered solo from requirements to production deployment. -->
<!--   \end{itemize} -->
<!-- \end{large} -->

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- EDUCATION -->
\begin{large}{\bf EDUCATION}
  \vspace{9pt}
  \hrule
  \vspace{9pt}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}{\href{https://www.uniroma3.it/}{\textit{Roma Tre University}}}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Rome, Italy\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.15cm}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}
    \textbf{PhD in Physics} (defended April 2022) 
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Nov. 2018 -- Oct. 2021\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.2cm}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item Focus: Monte Carlo simulation on HPC machines, analysis of lattice data
    \item Ranked 1st in national admission exam
  \end{itemize}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}{\href{https://www.uniroma3.it/}{\textit{Roma Tre University}}}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Rome, Italy\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.15cm}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}
    \textbf{M.S.\ in Physics}
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Oct. 2016 -- Oct. 2018\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.2cm}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item Grade: 110/110 cum laude | GPA: 29.85/30
  \end{itemize}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}{\href{https://www.uniroma3.it/}{\textit{Roma Tre University}}}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Rome, Italy\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.15cm}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}
    \textbf{B.S.\ in Physics}
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Oct. 2013 -- Jul. 2016\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.2cm}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item Grade: 110/110 cum laude | GPA: 28.84/30 | Merit Scholarship recipient
  \end{itemize}

\end{large}

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- LEADERSHIP -->
\begin{large}
{\bf LEADERSHIP \& ACHIEVEMENTS}
  \vspace{9pt}
  \hrule
  \vspace{9pt}

\setlength{\columnsep}{-4.5cm}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}    
      \textbf{Principal Investigator} -- 240,000 GPU node-hours compute grant
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}\href{https://www.cscs.ch/computers/alps}{CSCS ALPS} | 2025\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}

  \vspace{-0.15cm}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}    
      \textbf{Workshop Organizer} -- International HPC \& Quantum Computing workshop (30+ attendees)
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}\href{https://www.ectstar.eu/}{ECT*} | 2025\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}

  \vspace{-0.15cm}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}    
      \textbf{Invited Speaker} -- Technical seminars at CERN and ECT*
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}2025 -- 2026\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}

  \vspace{-0.15cm}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}
      \textbf{Visiting Grant} -- Networking funds from Univeristy of Bern
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}\href{https://www.tuwien.at/}{TU Wien} | 2026\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}


\end{large}
